title: erigeron cymosus
intro: Erigeron cymosus, also known as the Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it a treatment for various health conditions such as respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Erigeron cymosus include relief from congestion, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Erigeron cymosus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and can be dried or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
